SupportInquiry.title: Support Inquiry
SupportInquiry.description: User support questions submitted via the direct website support form in the FAQ section.

name.description: The name of the user asking the question.

contact.description: The user's email address or phone number.

category.description: The topic or category of the inquiry.

message.description: The message body containing the question.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the inquiry was submitted.

/support_inquiries/{inquiryId}.description: Collection of all direct website support queries.
